title: GOTS Cobblemon
description: A new Cobblemon adventure that features a LOT of extra mods. with 1k+ advancements!
body:
# Welcome to **GOTS Cobblemon!**
 
I made this pack because I wanted to play Cobblemon with extra mods that I like.
 
If you have any ideas on what I should add, or if you want to support us,  
Comment on our latest video or subscribe at 
# [YouTube.com/@GOTS](https://youtube.com/@GOTS)
 
and while you're there... you should watch some videos and maybe subscribe?
![GOTS Gaming YouTube Channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8417d041c3baf858dbbdaf6625f561ee422ce1.png)
 
### what I want to add:  
I will add the **_create_** mod once it is available for **_1.21.1_**
 
 
 
## This pack features:
 
### **over 1,000 advancements,**
###  **Simple Grass Flowers by 2DWisp**


#  Cobblemon (obviously):

![Turtwig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e00c52c4e00e931e74ca2ec3c74d1aa094b21d75_0.webp)

#  Better Nether and Better End:
  
![Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9863bf600055f51f843cca0725803a663948dd71_0.webp)
![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be9fd5eada69caacee674df766f28389345b4d8e_0.webp)
 
#  Terralith with Tectonic:
![Terralith Mountains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fde4300bcd10aa8049dc01970e93b3f54bd686a0_0.webp)
![Terralith Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48682971a433885bed03afaa183328833b16e1d5_0.webp)
![Terralith Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b628240aba9e05beea5609c214d858f0e863a0_0.webp)
  
#  And so much more!
 
 ![Desert Pillage Outpost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1d9ff14813b547872beb5764261d271b4dd7d0a_0.webp)
 ![Jungle Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc01e8e135471673910a4ac7688266ef75697106_0.webp)
![Castle Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec22ad59ddca4690d5b2f082e3e1e65b5fde8d8_0.webp)


**NOTE:** if you don't like the way the name of the cobblemon popping up at the bottom of the screen use this command **IN GAME:** **/function vanilla_refresh:_settings** and **click entities** and **disable Mob health display and disable spyglass mob info**
 
(I tried making that the default but couldn't figure out how to save it)
